prompt: Photorealistic close-up of a detective-style corkboard covered in photographs of different people. Red string connects the photos. Every single string leads to and from one central photograph — that one person is connected to everyone. Every other photograph has only one string, leading solely to that central photo. No photo on the edges connects to any other edge photo. The asymmetry is total and visually stark. Warm tungsten light, slightly chaotic pinned papers, worn corkboard texture, dramatic shadow. No text, no numbers, no labels, no words, no writing of any kind anywhere in the image.
visual_logic: One central photo connects via red string to every other photo. No edge photo connects to another edge photo. The hub has many friends; each spoke has only one. Every node's neighbor is better connected than itself.
